ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "social_media_profiles" TEXT /* Social media profiles of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the associated customer */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the associated customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the customer address */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the customer address */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the customer address */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., billing, shipping) */,
  "geolocation_data" TEXT /* Detailed geolocation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., shipped, delivered, canceled) */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code applied to the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier for the order */,
  "shipping_tracking_number" TEXT /* Shipping tracking number for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated order */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the product belongs */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* Image of the product */,
  "product_video" TEXT /* Video of the product */,
  "related_products" TEXT /* Related or complementary products */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated product */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the review (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order to which the item belongs */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Calculated subtotal for this line item (quantity * product price) */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the item (e.g., shipped, delivered, canceled) */,
  "item_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order related to the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid in the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used for the transaction */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support ticket */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who created the ticket */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue reported */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the ticket (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "ticket_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the ticket (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "ticket_category" TEXT /* Category of the ticket (e.g., technical, billing) */,
  "ticket_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution or outcome of the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, support) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "user_profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "campaign_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the campaign */,
  "campaign_target" TEXT /* Target for the campaign */,
  "campaign_budget_allocation" TEXT /* Budget allocation for different channels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign result entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign related to the results */,
  "total_reach" INTEGER /* Total number of people reached by the campaign */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions from the campaign */,
  "revenue_generated" REAL /* Revenue generated from the campaign */,
  "result_key_performance_indicators (KPIs)" TEXT /* Key performance indicators (KPIs) for the campaign */,
  "result_insights" TEXT /* Insights or observations from the campaign results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_results_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., email_open, purchase) */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign related to the interaction */,
  "interaction_source" TEXT /* Source of the interaction (e.g., email, social media) */,
  "interaction_medium" TEXT /* Medium of the interaction (e.g., paid social, organic search) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)
